description: Structured Grafana dashboard for Prometheus metrics emitted by rusty_intervals_mcp in HTTP mode. Covers RED-style service overview, HTTP transport, upstream intervals.icu dependency health, MCP/tool behavior, auth/security, and active usage/concurrency signals.

options.content:
# Intervals.icu MCP Observability

This dashboard is optimized for **HTTP mode** (`MCP_TRANSPORT=http`) and follows an operator-friendly flow: **overview → HTTP transport → upstream dependency → MCP/tools → auth/security → activity & concurrency**.

**Recommended workflow**
- Start with the top summary stats to spot regressions quickly.
- Use `Job` / `Instance` to scope a server, then narrow by `Path` or `Tool` for diagnosis.
- Look for correlation between HTTP errors, upstream latency, and auth/rate-limit spikes.

**Metrics covered**
- HTTP requests, latency, status mix, active requests
- intervals.icu upstream request/error behavior, circuit breaker state
- Tool calls, tool duration, MCP method and session activity
- Token verification, auth failures, rate limiting
- Active athletes and athlete activity observations
- Idempotency cache hit/miss/conflict rate

**Datasource mapping**: bind `DS_PROMETHEUS` during import. Scrape labels such as `job` and `instance` are used for filtering.

panels.description: Aggregate HTTP request throughput for the selected scrape targets and paths.
panels.title: HTTP throughput

panels.description: Share of HTTP traffic returning 4xx or 5xx for the selected targets.
panels.title: HTTP error rate

panels.description: p95 end-to-end HTTP latency across selected targets and paths.
panels.title: HTTP p95 latency

panels.description: Upstream intervals.icu error rate relative to total upstream requests.
panels.title: Upstream error rate

panels.description: Current in-flight HTTP requests across selected targets.
panels.title: Active requests

panels.description: Unique athletes seen during the in-memory 5 minute activity window.
panels.title: Active athletes

panels.description: HTTP request rate split by route and method.
panels.title: Requests by path

panels.description: Status code mix over time to reveal error bursts and traffic shifts.
panels.title: Status code mix

panels.description: p95 latency per route; use this to spot slow handlers and regressions.
panels.title: HTTP p95 latency by path

panels.description: Per-route HTTP error ratio; pairs well with latency to locate user-visible impact.
panels.title: HTTP error rate by path

panels.description: Top routes by current p95 latency.
panels.title: Top slow paths

panels.description: Top routes by current HTTP error ratio.
panels.title: Top failing paths

panels.description: Upstream request throughput split by HTTP status.
panels.title: Upstream requests by status

panels.description: Tail latency of upstream requests. Watch this alongside HTTP p95 to distinguish internal vs dependency regressions.
panels.title: Upstream p95 latency

panels.description: Error classification emitted by the client instrumentation.
panels.title: Upstream errors by type

panels.description: Count of upstream error categories over the active dashboard time range.
panels.title: Upstream error categories

panels.description: Circuit breaker state: 0=Closed (healthy), 1=Open (rejecting), 2=HalfOpen (testing recovery)
panels.title: Circuit breaker state

panels.description: Idempotency cache hit/miss/conflict rate.
panels.title: Idempotency cache operations

panels.description: Tool invocations split by tool and outcome.
panels.title: Tool throughput by status

panels.description: p95 tool execution time by tool.
panels.title: Tool p95 duration

panels.description: Current error ratio per tool.
panels.title: Tool error ratio

panels.description: MCP method rate, useful for understanding protocol mix and client behavior.
panels.title: MCP methods

panels.description: Session lifecycle counters emitted by the MCP server.
panels.title: MCP sessions

panels.description: Token verification attempts split by status.
panels.title: Token verifications

panels.description: Rate-limited request rate by protected endpoint.
panels.title: Rate-limited requests

panels.description: Auth failures categorized by reason.
panels.title: Auth failures by reason

panels.description: Issued JWT tokens per second.
panels.title: Token issuance

panels.description: Share of invalid or expired verifications among all token verification attempts.
panels.title: Invalid verification share

panels.description: Active athletes over time for the selected targets.
panels.title: Active athletes over time

panels.description: In-flight requests over time for selected targets.
panels.title: Active requests over time

panels.description: Rate of athlete activity observations entering the 5 minute sliding window tracker.
panels.title: Athlete activity observations

title: Intervals.icu MCP Observability
